messages.content: 重点内容

- 核心要点或重要信息
- 学习过程中需要着重理解的内容
- 考试或工作中需要掌握的关键知识点
- 与主题或问题直接相关的主要内容
翻译 重点内容
Key content
BFF 接口迁移
BFF接口迁移
翻译 BFF 接口迁移

BFF接口迁移

BFF（Backend for Frontend）是指为特定的前端应用程序设计的后端服务，它与前端应用程序紧密配合，提供定制化的API。当前，随着技术和业务的不断发展，需要对BFF接口进行迁移升级。这涉及到接口升级、版本管理、API文档更新等工作。迁移过程需要关注接口的稳定性、兼容性、可靠性，同时需要在保证正常运行基础上优化接口性能，规范接口访问。
翻译成英文：BFF 接口迁移
BFF Interface Migration
翻译成英文：IDL 生成 API 调用
IDL Generated API Invocation
BOE 环境 Mock
BOE Environment Mock
ToDev 管理平台
ToDev Management Platform
完成 Arena 与 Backstage 的 API 接口去 BFF 化，实现所有接口均收敛至网关，并最终下线 BFF 服务。
Complete the API interface BFF-ization for Arena and Backstage, and converge all interfaces to the gateway, finally going offline of the BFF service.
构建从 IDL 生成 API 调用的全链路解决方案，在基于服务端 IDL 生成前端的 API 调用代码之后（service.ts），前端的接口调用代码是具备 TS 全类型定义的，达成前端可以用类 RPC 调用的方式来请求后端接口的效果。

Build an end-to-end solution for generating API calls from IDL, after generating the frontend API call code based on the server-side IDL (service.ts), the frontend interface call code has TS full type definition, achieving the effect that the frontend can use the class RPC call to request the backend interface.
BOE 环境下许多页面的接口无数据，导致开发和调试困难，通过在 BOE 环境提供 Mock 解决方案，实现所有的无数据接口均能被 Mock 数据替代，让相关页面能在 BOE 环境下被正常访问。

Many pages' interfaces have no data in the BOE environment, making it difficult for development and debugging. By providing a Mock solution in the BOE environment, all interfaces without data can be replaced with Mock data, allowing relevant pages to be accessed normally in the BOE environment.
针对 RD 的内部提效场景，搭建 ToDev 的研发平台，将研发所需的相关功能（如接口管理、Mock、模块管理等）统一集成至平台上，完成 aPaaS 搭建的探索和集成、产出 ToDev 平台全栈开发最佳实践并形成研发侧的统一 Portal。

To improve the efficiency of RD's internal operations, a development platform called ToDev is built, which integrates relevant functions needed by development, such as interface management, Mock, module management, etc. The exploration and integration of aPaaS construction are completed, and the best practices of full-stack development for the ToDev platform are established, forming a unified portal on the development side.
- Server 侧迁移规划
- Server-Side Migration Plan
字节内部 aPaaS 解决方案
Byte's Internal aPaaS Solution

- BFF 迁移：完成 50 % 的接口迁移
- RPC tools：代码生成方案完成 backstage mvp 接入、完成工具使用数据统计
- Boe Mock ：对齐 boe 基准环境因数仓接口导致页面不可用问题解决方案
- API Mock： 在 Backstage mvp 版本落地、完成工具使用数据统计

- BFF Migration: 50% of interface migration completed
- RPC tools: Code generation solution completed for Backstage MVP access, usage data statistics completed for the tools
- BOE Mock: Solution to the problem of page unavailability due to factor warehouse interface alignment in BOE benchmark environment
- API Mock: Landing in Backstage MVP version, usage data statistics for the tools completed

- BFF 迁移：Arena 旧 BFF 接口迁移完成，整体完成 80 %
- RPC tools：兼容非标 IDL 场景、集成请求库并完成新网关架构下的自动化配置方案落地，覆盖率达到 50%
- Boe Mock ：解决数仓接口在 boe 基准环境不可用 case ，覆盖率达到 40%
- API Mock：完成 bam mock 插件的迁移，并在 arena 和 backstage 落地，接口覆盖率 30%；mock engine 完成基于规则配置生成 mock data 的底层设计与 mvp 实现
- MetaData ：提供业务线上接入能力和基于 package 的 api 管理能力
- Oasis：完成平台页面框架的设计与落地、提供完整的研发流程和规范、调研集成 aPaaS 搭建的可行性方案

- BFF Migration: Arena's old BFF interface migration completed, overall completion reached 80%
- RPC tools: Compatible with non-standard IDL scenarios, integration with request libraries and completion of automated configuration solutions under the new gateway architecture, achieving coverage of 50%
- BOE Mock: Achieved 40% coverage, solving the problem of factor warehouse interfaces being unavailable in the BOE benchmark environment
- API Mock: Completed the migration of the BAM Mock plugin, and landed in Arena and Backstage, with interface coverage reaching 30%. The Mock Engine completed the underlying design and MVP implementation for generating Mock data based on rule configuration
- MetaData: Provided business line access capability and package-based API management capability
- Oasis: Completed the design and implementation of the platform page framework, provided a complete development process and standards, and investigated and integrated feasible solutions for aPaaS construction.

- BFF 迁移：完成 Arena 和 Backstage 所有接口的迁移工作
- RPC tools： 完成基于 Metadata 的代码生成方案、请求库中添加接口监控并在 arena 和 backstage 中落地，整体覆盖率 70%
- Boe Mock ：通过 Metadata 控制 boe mock 、解决公会侧页面不可用 case，整体覆盖率 60%
- API Mock：mock data 底层数据生成能力由 mock engine 承接，新方案落地 arena 和 backstage，0 配置覆盖率 30%，整体覆盖率 50%
- MetaData ： 提供 package 元信息版本管理能力、提供基于新网关架构的 api 自动化匹配能力、并在 arena 和 backstage 实际接入
- Oasis：产出全栈开发以及项目搭建的最佳实践、完成宣贯并推广到平台部各个团队，并实际落地不少于 5 个功能

- BFF Migration: Completed the migration of all interfaces for Arena and Backstage
- RPC tools: Completed the code generation solution based on Metadata, added interface monitoring to request libraries, and landed in Arena and Backstage, achieving overall coverage of 70%
- BOE Mock: Controlled BOE Mock through Metadata, solved the problem of guild-side page unavailability, achieving overall coverage of 60%
- API Mock: The underlying data generation capability of Mock Data is undertaken by the Mock Engine, and the new solution has been implemented in Arena and Backstage, with zero configuration coverage reaching 30% and overall coverage reaching 50%.
- MetaData: Provided version management capabilities for package metadata, provided API automation matching capabilities based on the new gateway architecture, and was actually accessed in Arena and Backstage.
- Oasis: Produced the best practices for full-stack development and project construction, completed promotion and promotion to various teams of the platform department, and landed no less than 5 features in practice.

- RPC tools：推广并在 MP & DATA & AML 中接入，整体覆盖率 80%
- Boe Mock ：解决 MP & DATA & AML boe 基准环境页面不可用的 case，覆盖率 80%
- API Mock：补全智能生成 mock 数据能力以及支持 IDL 变更后的兼容性数据生成能力，0 配置覆盖率 60%，整体覆盖率 80%
- MetaData ： 兼容非新网关架构 场景下的 api 自动化匹配能力、接入接口监控信息和权限信息
- Oasis：探索平台研发（全栈方向）提效方案、持续推进平台能力建设，并实际落地不少于 10 个功能

- RPC tools: Promoted and accessed in MP, DATA, and AML, achieving overall coverage of 80%
- BOE Mock: Solved the problem of unavailability of pages in BOE benchmark environment for MP, DATA, and AML, achieving coverage of 80%
- API Mock: Completed the intelligent generation of Mock data capability and the compatibility data generation capability after IDL changes, achieving a 0-configuration coverage of 60% and an overall coverage of 80%
- MetaData: Compatible with API automation matching capabilities in scenarios other than the new gateway architecture, and access interface monitoring information and permission information
- Oasis: Explored platform development (full-stack direction) efficiency improvement solutions, continued to promote platform capability construction, and implemented no less than 10 features in practice
